argument.script: async (intermediate) => { for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) { const followBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid$="-follow"]'); const unblockBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid$="-unblock"]'); if (followBtn || unblockBtn) return { ready: true }; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); } return { ready: false }; }

async (intermediate) => { if (!intermediate.ready) return { ok: false, message: 'Could not find Unblock button. Are you logged in?' }; const username = '{{ username }}'.replace(/^@/, ''); try { const followBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid$="-follow"]'); if (followBtn) return { ok: true, message: 'Not blocking @' + username + ' (already unblocked).' }; const unblockBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid$="-unblock"]'); if (!unblockBtn) return { ok: false, message: 'Could not find Unblock button. Are you logged in?' }; unblockBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); const confirmBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="confirmationSheetConfirm"]'); if (confirmBtn) { confirmBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); } const verify = document.querySelector('[data-testid$="-follow"]'); if (verify) return { ok: true, message: 'Successfully unblocked @' + username + '.' }; return { ok: false, message: 'Unblock action initiated but UI did not update.' }; } catch (e) { return { ok: false, message: String(e) }; } }
